name: @r3b1s/pi-subagents-deterministic
description_en: Deterministic subagent routing via Pi's tool_call hook — resolves model and thinking from model-routing.yml and injects them into pi-subagents' subagent tool calls.
description_zh: 通过 Pi 的 tool_call 钩子进行确定性子代理路由 — 从 model-routing.yml 解析模型和思考，并将它们注入到 pi-subagents 的子代理工具调用中。
